title: P8 TUI full-tree closeout commit window
body: Mossy Blossoming Canopy opening a short git index/head window to land the owner-approved full dirty tree: P8 TUI foundation repair, pnpm/dependency refresh, generated schema outputs, and handoff surfaces. Active claim 8af0fe3a-67ff-484e-8c7d-c86f60e1aa35.
